category: Complex dynamics / polynomial automorphisms of C²
formula_or_rule: Iterate H_{a,c}(z,w)=(z^2+c-a*w, z); color by escape of |z|²+|w|² and/or slice w=0.
expected_visual_signature: Folded 2D slice of a 4D Julia set, webbed filaments distinct from real Hénon attractor dots.
primary_citations: Rigidity of Julia sets for Henon type maps, DOI 10.3934/jmd.2014.8.1; Control of Julia Sets in Complex Henon Systems, DOI 10.1007/978-981-10-7050-1_7
why_distinct_from_existing: Existing henon entry is a real strange attractor/map; this is a complex two-variable Julia escape slice.
smallest_implementation_batch: Add escape-time shader plus CPU parity on 5 sample points.

formula_or_rule: Continuous field A updated by convolution kernels and mass-conservative flow: A_{t+1}=A_t + dt * div(flow(A,K*A,growth)).
expected_visual_signature: Soft living blobs, gliders, rotating organisms, smooth morphogenesis.
primary_citations: Flow-Lenia: Emergent evolutionary dynamics in mass conservative continuous cellular automata, DOI 10.1162/artl_a_00471
why_distinct_from_existing: Catalog has discrete CA and reaction-diffusion; no continuous mass-conservative Lenia/Flow-Lenia organism field found.
smallest_implementation_batch: Texture ping-pong shader with one Gaussian/ring kernel preset.

formula_or_rule: Digit IFS on m×n grid: F_{i,j}(x,y)=((x+i)/m,(y+j)/n) for allowed digit set D; render membership by base-m/base-n digit tests.
expected_visual_signature: Rectangular self-affine carpet with anisotropic scaling and non-Sierpinski column structure.
primary_citations: The self-affine carpets of McMullen and Bedford have infinite Hausdorff measure, DOI 10.1017/s0305004100072789; Fractal Geometry of Bedford-McMullen Carpets, OpenAlex/Crossref search receipt
why_distinct_from_existing: Catalog has Sierpinski/Menger-like carpets, not a Bedford-McMullen digit-set self-affine carpet renderer.
smallest_implementation_batch: Single shader with m,n and encoded digit mask uniforms.

formula_or_rule: Approximate Harper-Hofstadter spectrum for flux p/q via q×q tight-binding recurrence; plot energy bands vs magnetic flux α.
expected_visual_signature: Butterfly-shaped fractal gaps and nested spectral wings.
primary_citations: Hall plateau diagram for the Hofstadter butterfly energy spectrum, DOI 10.1103/physrevb.73.155304; Spectroscopy of the fractal Hofstadter energy spectrum, DOI 10.1038/s41586-024-08550-2
why_distinct_from_existing: Not an escape-time fractal; catalog lacks spectral/quantum fractal visualizations.
smallest_implementation_batch: CPU precompute spectrum bitmap first; shader colors sampled spectral distance.

formula_or_rule: Two-field prey/predator PDE with nonlinear reaction terms and diffusion; classic patchiness model.
parameter_defaults: preyGrowth=1; predation=1; predatorDeath=0.5; preyDiffusion=0.05; predatorDiffusion=1.0; dt=0.02
expected_visual_signature: Patchy spots, labyrinths, predator-prey spatial mosaics.
primary_citations: On a diffusive prey-predator model which exhibits patchiness, DOI 10.1016/0022-5193(78)90332-6; Pattern Formation in a Cross-Diffusive Ratio-Dependent Predator-Prey Model, DOI 10.1155/2012/814069
why_distinct_from_existing: Distinct ecological predator-prey kinetics; not Gray-Scott, Klausmeier, Brusselator, or generic Turing presets.
smallest_implementation_batch: Static explicit-iteration shader with finite 8×8 CPU step test.

formula_or_rule: Discrete excitable media CA including curvature/dispersion effects; cell excitation depends on neighbor state and refractory dynamics.
expected_visual_signature: Curved target waves and spiral waves with dispersion-sensitive fronts.
primary_citations: A Cellular Automaton Model of Excitable Media Including Curvature and Dispersion, DOI 10.1126/science.2321017
why_distinct_from_existing: More specific than generic cyclic/Greenberg-Hastings CA; includes curvature/dispersion controls.
smallest_implementation_batch: Reuse excitable CA shader pattern with two extra controls.

formula_or_rule: x_i(t+1)=(1-ε) f(x_i)+ε/2*(f(x_{i-1})+f(x_{i+1})), f(x)=r*x*(1-x); render i vs t or 2D lattice.
expected_visual_signature: Bands of synchronized chaos, turbulent stripes, localized spatiotemporal defects.
primary_citations: Spatiotemporal chaos in mixed linear–nonlinear coupled logistic map lattice, DOI 10.1016/j.physa.2014.01.051; Controlling spatiotemporal chaos in coupled map lattice systems, DOI 10.1103/physrevlett.72.68
why_distinct_from_existing: Catalog has standalone logistic/lyapunov maps, not coupled-map-lattice spacetime fields.
smallest_implementation_batch: 1D lattice spacetime shader plus deterministic row CPU test.

formula_or_rule: Expose a cited higher-order family for f(z)=z^n-1 with formula-specific update Φ(z,f,f′,f″); color by root and convergence speed.
expected_visual_signature: Newton-like basins with thinner filaments and order-dependent convergence bands.
primary_citations: Higher-Order Root-Finding Algorithms and Their Basins of Attraction, DOI 10.1155/2020/5070363; A New Nonlinear Ninth-Order Root-Finding Method with Error Analysis and Basins of Attraction, DOI 10.3390/math9161996
why_distinct_from_existing: Existing catalog has fixed named solvers; this should admit only paper-formula methods not already represented.
smallest_implementation_batch: Extract exact formula before coding; add one method only with source comment and basin test.

formula_or_rule: Affine IFS maps S_i(x)=A_i x+t_i with finite-type neighbor graph; render attractor by inverse iteration/address coloring.
expected_visual_signature: Skewed self-affine tiles with nonuniform scaling and neighbor-graph boundary motifs.
primary_citations: Self-affine fractals of finite type, DOI 10.4064/bc84-0-9; An explicit formula for the pressure of box-like affine iterated function systems, DOI 10.4171/jfg/72
why_distinct_from_existing: Catalog has many similarity IFS/fractal curves; finite-type affine IFS adds non-similarity scaling and address graph structure.
smallest_implementation_batch: One curated finite-type map set; no generic graph engine.

formula_or_rule: Two-species reaction-diffusion model tuned to stable square and oscillatory Turing modes; ping-pong finite difference update.
expected_visual_signature: Square lattices, oscillatory checker spots, superposed Turing modes.
primary_citations: Stable Squares and Other Oscillatory Turing Patterns in a Reaction-Diffusion Model, DOI 10.1103/physrevlett.92.198303; Spatial Resonances and Superposition Patterns in a Reaction-Diffusion Model with Interacting Turing Modes, DOI 10.1103/physrevlett.88.208303
why_distinct_from_existing: Potentially overlaps generic Turing/Gray-Scott; accept only as a distinct named kinetic preset with cited parameters.
smallest_implementation_batch: Preset in existing RD framework if kinetics match; otherwise one static shader.

formula_or_rule: Implicit fractal surface from affine IFS distance bound; ray-cast using reduced affine arithmetic / interval-safe distance estimate.
expected_visual_signature: Smooth-but-fractal implicit 3D shells with nested affine cavities.
primary_citations: Ray casting implicit fractal surfaces with reduced affine arithmetic, DOI 10.1007/s00371-006-0090-7; New Techniques for Ray Tracing Procedurally Defined Objects, DOI 10.1145/357323.357324
why_distinct_from_existing: Existing raymarched fractals are mostly known distance estimators; this is an affine-arithmetic implicit surface technique.
smallest_implementation_batch: Prototype only; add after visual/performance proof.

formula_or_rule: Iterate matrix logistic map X_{n+1}=R X_n(I-X_n); plot eigenvalue/spectral distributions or escape in matrix norm.
expected_visual_signature: Spectral islands and fractal basin-like matrix-eigenvalue clouds.
primary_citations: Matrix logistic map: fractal spectral distributions and transfer of chaos, DOI 10.1063/5.0298024
why_distinct_from_existing: Catalog has scalar logistic maps; no matrix-valued logistic spectral fractal found.
smallest_implementation_batch: 2×2 matrix-only shader; avoid general matrix engine.
